title: Explore & Create
description: A modpack designed with the aim of enhancing minecraft's finest aspects to the fullest. Creation and Exploration.
body:
A modpack designed with the aim of enhancing minecraft's finest aspects to the fullest; Creation and Exploration.

Using the Create mod, Valkyiren skies and their addons to strech the boundaries of minecraft and allow your imaginations to come to life in a world with various biomes, structures and expansive terrain made possible by the stardust teams, tectonic and yung's and hopo's mods. These terrain being populated by various *wildlife*, monsters and bosses that either materialize spontaneously or need to be spawned. The modpack also includes various QOL mods.

This modpack is not related to or inspired by the create & explore modpack.
I didnt even know it existed before trying to publishing this.(If you've got a better name pls let me know)

All the mods belong to their respective owners/creators, I simply altered some to better their cohesion within this modpack, such as receipe, config and some functionality changes. Basically, I modded some of the mods.
